summary: Comprehensive testing of Job Application Workflow (iteration 8). All 12 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Recruiter Applications page shows all applications with applicant details (name, email, skills, cover letter from applicant_snapshot). Job Seeker My Applications page shows their applications with Withdraw button. Withdraw functionality working correctly - removes application from active list and updates status to 'withdrawn'.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/applications returns correct format: { application: {...}, job: {...} } for both user types
For recruiters: query by account_id to get all applications to their jobs
For job seekers: query by applicant_id to get their own applications
applicant_snapshot contains first_name, last_name, email, skills, location, about_me
PUT /api/applications/{id}/withdraw validates applicant ownership before allowing withdrawal
Cannot withdraw applications in final states: withdrawn, rejected, offered
seed_data_creation: Test applications created via API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job application workflow fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/applications (returns different data for recruiter vs job seeker), PUT /api/applications/{id}/withdraw (job seekers only). ApplicationManagement.js (recruiter view) reads from application.applicant_snapshot. MyApplications.js (job seeker view) shows withdraw button for non-final status applications.

recruiter_login.details: Recruiter can login with hr@techcorp.co.za / demo123

job_seeker_login.details: Job seeker can login with johan.botha@gmail.com / demo123

recruiter_get_applications.details: GET /api/applications returns applications for recruiter's account with applicant_snapshot

job_seeker_get_applications.details: GET /api/applications returns job seeker's own applications with job details

application_data_structure.details: Response format: { application: {id, job_id, status, applicant_snapshot, ...}, job: {title, company_name, ...} }

applicant_snapshot_fields.details: applicant_snapshot contains: first_name, last_name, email, skills, location, about_me

cannot_withdraw_twice.details: Returns 400 when trying to withdraw already withdrawn application

recruiter_applications_ui.details: Shows applicant name, email, location, skills, cover letter, status badges, action buttons

job_seeker_applications_ui.details: Shows job title, company name, location, applied date, status, Withdraw button

withdraw_button_functionality.details: Clicking Withdraw shows confirm dialog, on accept updates status to 'withdrawn'
